summary: Verified draggable HEADER BLOCK reordering (Logo/Nav/Actions) in the sidebar HeaderInspector and its effect on the storefront header. Primary DnD reorder verified via synthesized dragstart/dragover/drop events with shared DataTransfer. Block order in inspector and horizontal positions in storefront both update as expected; blockOrder is persisted via PUT /api/config and restored by Reset. /store also honors blockOrder.

issues: store-logo data-testid is only emitted when editable=true (added via pick()), while store-nav and store-actions are hard-coded and always present. Minor inconsistency — for parity add data-testid='store-logo' unconditionally so external assertions on public storefront can locate the logo block.

verified_flows: header-inspector visible with three blocks in order [hdr-block-logo, hdr-block-nav, hdr-block-actions]
drag handles present (block-drag-logo/nav/actions) and hint 'Arrastra los bloques...' shown
Dragging block-drag-actions onto hdr-block-logo title-bar reorders inspector to [actions, logo, nav]
store-header re-renders: store-actions.x (285) becomes < store-logo.x (561) < store-nav.x (838) after reorder
Block reorder does NOT change nested nav-link order and vice-versa (block order intact after nested test)
Selection sync: store-logo -> logo-mode visible; store-nav-0 -> nav-href-0 visible; store-action-0 -> action-href-0 visible
nav-add disabled when navLinks reaches NAV_MAX (7)
/store route respects blockOrder: store-actions.x (~124) < store-nav.x (~1119) after publishing reordered blockOrder
action_items: (Minor) Emit data-testid='store-logo' on StoreHeader logo unconditionally (not gated by editable), matching store-nav/store-actions.
critical_code_review_comments: StoreHeader logo testid gated by editable via pick() while nav/actions testids are hard-coded — asymmetric.

useDnd relies on native HTML5 DnD; documented workaround (dispatch dragstart/dragover/drop with shared DataTransfer) works but this makes automation fragile. Consider a pointer-based DnD lib for stronger E2E resilience.
HeaderInspector.jsx is approaching size limits (~197 lines) — still OK, but ACTION_PRESETS/BLOCK_META could move to a constants file for reuse.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for primary DnD block-reorder criteria; test-script false negatives on 3 regression items (product features confirmed working via alternate observations)

seed_data_creation: None. Reset+Publish executed at end to restore default blockOrder.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Header inspector block-level DnD works. On /store, store-logo has NO data-testid because pick() is gated by editable — assert /store block order via store-actions and store-nav positions (or use CSS to locate logo). To trigger DnD in Playwright use JS-dispatch of DragEvent with a shared DataTransfer against the block-drag-* handle and the block title-bar (first child div inside hdr-block-*).
